_meta.description: LIP C6 AML Sanctions snapshot — merged from public-domain government lists

sources.OFAC: US Treasury SDN list — https://sanctionslist.ofac.treas.gov/ (public domain)
sources.UN: UN Security Council Consolidated List — https://scsanctions.un.org/ (public domain)
sources.EU: EU CFSP Consolidated Sanctions List — https://data.europa.eu/ (CC0)
